ops.body: Fixed in commit 1685628 (SecureEnclaveWrapper.Close returns an error on a nonzero cache-dropkey Result.Code, mirroring Wrap/Unwrap). Released in cookiesync v0.11.1. Test: TestCloseSurfacesNonzeroDropExit. NOTE: the signed Swift helper still always exits 0 on drop; end-to-end completion tracked in follow-up c67aed3.
